examples: And when God made a father 'hands, they were large and sinewy.
Saw I your gait and saw I your sinewy limbs, clothed in blue, bearing.
McKinley, into a destination that was once seen mostly by a trickle of sinewy backpackers.
This time, its sinewy melody, reminiscent of Kurt Weill, was accompanied by the composer's chanted lyrics.
